Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 31 

CTZNSHP_IND 

LABEL: U.S. Citizenship Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates if the beneficiary is identified as a U.S. Citizen; most recent in the calendar and the two prior 
years. 

SHORT NAME: CTZNSHP_IND 

LONG NAME: CTZNSHP_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0
